title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 68: How to Create Anime Illustrations - NetaYume v3.5
description:
Learn how to create anime illustrations in ComfyUI using the NetaYume v3.5 model! In this episode, we’ll walk through a complete setup, from installing the model and building a basic workflow to adding upscalers, testing styles, and using image-to-image generation. Even if you’re new to anime art generation, this tutorial will guide you step-by-step with clear explanations and practical examples.

You’ll see how to:
- Set up and run the NetaYume v3.5 anime model in ComfyUI
- Customize prompts with LLM-based instructions for better results
- Use and combine over 900 style references for unique looks
-Add upscaling models (like Nomos 2, Siax, and Anime Sharp) for sharper images
- Switch between text-to-image and image-to-image workflows
- Generate in full HD, fix image ratios, and optimize VRAM usage
- Run ComfyUI in the cloud with Running Hub and API workflows

Whether you’re an artist, AI creator, or hobbyist, you’ll learn how to get professional-quality anime illustrations, from conce
